Name: Average time from Awaiting Assignment to Batch to Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Total time between Awaiting Assignment to Batch and First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Minimum time for Awaiting Assignment to Batch to be followed by Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Average time it takes Awaiting Assignment to Batch after the execution of First Look-Your updates are overdue
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look-Your updates are overdue' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Total resolution time of Awaiting Assignment to Batch across all cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Awaiting Assignment to Batch and the end of the case

Name: Time from SW-EIC Accept to Awaiting Assignment to Batch
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-EIC Accept' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Elapsed time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and Awaiting Assignment to Batch
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Average waiting time to the Awaiting Assignment to Batch following First Look-Your updates are due in one week
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look-Your updates are due in one week' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Time of Awaiting Assignment to Batch in variants that include SW-EIC Accept -> Manuscript Export Succeeded -> First Look-Please submit updates -> First Look-Your updates are due in one week -> First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation -> Awaiting Assignment to Batch -> Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and the end of case where activity 'SW-EIC Accept occurs

Name: Total time it takes Awaiting Assignment to Batch after First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in cases that end with Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Average time for Awaiting Assignment to Batch in variants where the prior activity is First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Time between Awaiting Assignment to Batch and Manuscript Export Succeeded compared to the time between SW-EIC Accept and First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation within the same variant
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Cycle Time of Awaiting Assignment to Batch measured from its occurrence to the next Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Average time between Awaiting Assignment to Batch and the subsequent Manuscript Export Succeeded, grouped by case:concept:name
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'", 'end': "activity == 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'concept:name'}"

Name: Minimum time from Awaiting Assignment to Batch to the next Manuscript Export Succeeded in high-performance variants (performance < 500000)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'", 'end': "activity == 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'", 'aggregation': 'minimum', 'filter': 'code < 500000'}"
